hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; fp=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); [ -n "$fp" ] && echo "$fp" | grep -qE '\.(rs)$' && [ -f "$fp" ] && grep -n 'println!' "$fp" 2>/dev/null | head -3 | while read line; do echo "[Hook] WARNING: println! found: $line"; done || true

command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; fp=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); [ -n "$fp" ] && echo "$fp" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && [ -f "$fp" ] && grep -n 'console\.log' "$fp" 2>/dev/null | head -3 | while read line; do echo "[Hook] WARNING: console.log found: $line"; done || true

command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; fp=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); [ -n "$fp" ] && echo "$fp" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && [ -f "$fp" ] && grep -n ': any' "$fp" 2>/dev/null | head -3 | while read line; do echo "[Hook] WARNING: any type found: $line"; done || true

command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; fp=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); [ -n "$fp" ] && echo "$fp" | grep -qE '\.(rs)$' && [ -f "$fp" ] && grep -n 'unwrap()' "$fp" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | while read line; do echo "[Hook] NOTE: unwrap() usage: $line"; done || true

command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; fp=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); [ -n "$fp" ] && echo "$fp" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|rs)$' && [ -f "$fp" ] && lines=$(wc -l < "$fp") && [ "$lines" -gt 400 ] && echo "[Hook] WARNING: File has $lines lines (exceeds 400 line limit): $fp" || true
command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; cmd=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh pr create' && echo '[Hook] PR created - check CI status' || true

command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; fp=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); [ -n "$fp" ] && echo "$fp" | grep -qE 'src-tauri/src/(db|models)/' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[DB Hook] 数据库相关文件已修改，如果涉及表结构或字段变更，请同步更新 .claude/rules/database.md 和 doc/database-design.md"}}' || true

command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; cmd=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key)' && echo 'BLOCKED: Potential sensitive file access' && exit 1 || true
command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; cmd=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push' && echo '[Hook] About to push - ensure lint and build passed' || true

command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; fp=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$fp" | grep -q 'node_modules\|target/' && echo 'BLOCKED: Do not write to node_modules or target' && exit 1 || true
